## Linked Issues

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (changes to .md files or wiki)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement (aesthetic tweaks or mobile responsiveness fixes)

## 🤖 AI Disclosure
- [ ] This contribution used AI assistance.
- **Tools used**: [e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot]
- **Human verification**: I have personally reviewed and tested all AI-generated code.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's **English-only** policy.
- [ ] I have read and followed [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) and [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings/errors in backend logs or frontend console.

## 🧪 Verification
- [ ] Docker build successful: `docker compose up -d --build`
- [ ] Backend API docs load: `http://localhost:5005/docs`
- [ ] Frontend tested on Desktop
- [ ] Frontend tested on Mobile (375px viewport)
